name: Addigy
description: Monitor managed Apple devices for security compliance and device management status

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Addigy at https://app.addigy.com
2. Go to Account > Integrations > API v2
3. Generate or copy your API Token
4. Find your Parent Organization ID in Account > Organization
5. Enter both values below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Your Addigy API v2 token from Account > Integrations > API v2

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Retrieve all managed devices in the organization

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Check device compliance and security configuration
